mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPORT ( SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_SUP_NO.NEXTVAL, #{supCn}, #{supAnsCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT WHERE sup_no = #{supNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT t1.SUP_NO, t1.SUP_CN, t1.SUP_ANS_CN, t1.SUP_REG, t1.SUP_REG_HM, t1.SUP_ANS_REG, t1.SUP_ANS_REG_HM, t1.REG_NO, t1.SUP_YN, COUNT(*) OVER() as totalCnt FROM support t1 LEFT JOIN SS_USER t2 ON t1.REG_NO = t2.USER_NO WHERE 1 = 1
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPORT SET SUP_CN = #{supCn}, SUP_ANS_CN = #{supAnsCn}, SUP_ANS_REG = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), SUP_ANS_REG_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), SUP_YN = #{supYn} WHERE SUP_NO = #{supNo}
mapper.select: SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUP_REG, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUP_ANS_REG, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT ORDER BY SUP_NO DESC
